title: pilosella longiscapa
intro: Pilosella longiscapa, also known as the lesser hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Pilosella longiscapa has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone content. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Pilosella longiscapa can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
